sentence_reviews.text: Data curation collects, filters, balances, labels, documents, and governs examples so the training distribution better matches intended capabilities and risks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are sensitive to data quality, hyperparameters, compute budget, random variation, and evaluation contamination. Its direct dependencies include Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Data collection, curation & filtering is modeled as depending on Datasets, sampling & splits, Databases & information retrieval and feeding downstream nodes such as Deduplication, contamination control & provenance, Large-scale pretraining, Curricula, data mixtures & sampling schedules.
